title: Alye parusa
writer: Alexander Grin, Aleksei Nagornyj, Aleksandr Yurovsky
actors: Anastasiya Vertinskaya, Vasiliy Lanovoy, Yelena Cheremshanova
plot: A little girl Assol met a wizard and it has been foretold: "... it will be a fine sunny day when a beautiful ship under scarlet sail comes and the noble prince will take you away from here. He'll take you to the world of your drea...
